formatted_text:
[Narrator] (calm)(serious): She entered the room. The door closed behind her with a soft click. He looked up from his desk. Hello. He set down his pen. She smiled, moving closer. The clock on the wall ticked steadily. Have a seat. He gestured to the chair. She sat down, smoothing her dress. He leaned back in his chair. Tell me what you need.
[Narrator] : "Hello,"
[Narrator] : he said, setting down his pen.
[Narrator] : "Have a seat,"
[Narrator] : "Tell me what you need,"
[Narrator] : he said.

dialogues.text: She entered the room. The door closed behind her with a soft click. He looked up from his desk. Hello. He set down his pen. She smiled, moving closer. The clock on the wall ticked steadily. Have a seat. He gestured to the chair. She sat down, smoothing her dress. He leaned back in his chair. Tell me what you need.
he said, setting down his pen.

ambiguities.text: He looked up from his desk.
She sat down, smoothing her dress.
He leaned back in his chair.
